name: Ancient Chant
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>古</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>いにしえ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>呪</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>文</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>もん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Add 1 "The Winged Dragon of Ra" from your Deck or GY to your hand, and if you do, you can Tribute Summon 1 monster during your Main Phase this turn, in addition to your Normal Summon/Set. (You can only gain this effect once per turn.) You can banish this card from your GY: If you Tribute Summon "The Winged Dragon of Ra" this turn, its original ATK/DEF become the combined original ATK/DEF of the monsters Tributed for its Summon. You can only activate 1 "Ancient Chant" per turn.
eff: Add 1 "The Winged Dragon of Ra" from your Deck or GY to your hand, and if you do, you can Tribute Summon 1 monster during your Main Phase this turn, in addition to your Normal Summon/Set. You can only activate 1 "Ancient Chant" per turn.

banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
misc: Gain this effect once per turn
